title: Shai-Hulud Themed Malware Found in the PyTorch Lightning AI Training Library
author: Hacker News (Best)
summary: A malicious package named 'Shai-Hulud' was discovered in the PyTorch Lightning ecosystem on PyPI, compromising the legitimate 'lightning' training library with obfuscated backdoor code. The attack involved typosquatting and supply-chain injection, enabling remote code execution and credential exfiltration. This incident highlights critical security risks in AI/ML dependency management and underscores the need for stricter package verification and supply-chain integrity practices.
